subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of Names and Ruler of the Kingdom of Heaven! I beseech Thee by Thy Light which shineth from the Supreme Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الاسماء و مالک ملکوت السماء اسئلک بنورک المشرق من الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for women
